name: InfoBank Corporation
summary: InfoBank Corporation provides mobile applications in South Korea. It offers iMessage, a messaging service for corporate use; iLab, a non-face-to-face financial service/smartphone service; iMotors, an autonomous vehicle solutions; iBiz, a web RTC (Vcall)/two-way message service; iTechEx, an IT service management service; and iAccel, an investment/TIPS/IB venture/management strategy/startup acceleration. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Seongnam-si, South Korea.
